jobDescription: Join MIRYA as a Senior Software Engineer and help build a scalable, intelligent automation platform.

jobDetails.title: Job Description
jobDetails.description: As a Senior Software Engineer at MIRYA, you will design, build, and maintain core systems that power our automation intelligence. You'll collaborate closely with product, design, and infrastructure teams to ship features that are stable, scalable, secure, and intuitive for end-users.

responsibilities.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Architect and develop core platform services, modules, and backend systems
Implement automation logic, workflow execution engines, and integrations
Build secure, performant APIs and data structures
Review code, provide technical guidance, and support junior developers
Ensure best practices in testing, CI/CD, security, and documentation
Research emerging technologies relevant to automation, AI, and enterprise operations

requirements.title: Requirements:
items: Strong proficiency in modern backend languages (Node.js, Python, Go, or similar).
Experience with cloud-native environments (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
Understanding of microservices, distributed systems, and API design.
Experience working with SQL or NoSQL databases.
Commitment to clean code, testing strategies, and engineering best practices

label: Jobs
title: Current job opening at MIRYA
description: Discover opportunities across engineering, marketing, and operations as we build the future of intelligent automation.
